WINDOW: 1354.367s to 1390.367s (smile at 1374.367s to 1375.367s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1317.750-1370.660] interviewee: office. This was in the hospital-- a huge office. In the back behind the desk sits an older officer. I recognize right away on the epaulets he's a doctor, because they have the snake, the doctors.
[1370.660-1477.560] interviewee: And he said, sit down. I was wondering, me? I'm a Jew. He tells me to sit down. I sit down. What is your name? I gave him my name. Is your father alive? I said, yes. What is his name? Leopold. And he smiles. He said you know, I know your father very
